title: Masterplug TMS24-MP Energy Saving Daily Mechanical Segment Timer Plug, White
features: SAVE AND CONSERVE ENERGY WHEN USING ELECTRICAL APPLIANCES: With this mechanical segment timer from Masterplug at Luceco

EASY TO USE DIAL ON THE FRONT TO SET YOUR TIMER: With numbers running from 1 to 24, which represents the 24-hour clock, with marked lines, that indicate 15-minute intervals, so you can set the time accurately
USE TO CONTROL ELECTRICAL APPLIANCES IN THE HOME: From heaters to lights, seasonal decorative lighting, as well as heated lamps for pets
THE BLUE SEGMENTS REPRESENT THE TIME YOU REQUIRE THE TIMER: Simply press in each segment to set the time required for the timer
TWO SWITCHES ON THE SIDE OF THE TIMER PLUG: Lets you choose whether to keep the timer on or flick it to timer option when the timer is required
